response.justification: Over 15 years of fullstack experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React core, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and a demonstrated testing-first craftsmanship culture (TDD, test tooling authorship) align closely with the role's primary stack and its AI agent development requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work matches the AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks)
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated; Python not listed
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named despite broad testing background
